title: The BAFTA's Big N-Word Debacle...
description:
An actor with Tourette's let loose the n-word at the BAFTA awards and the internet is on fire. Some people are actually blaming the actor, John Davidson, for being racist against Michael B. Jordan and Delroy Lindo... even though he can't control his tics. This includes YouTuber Grace Randolph, Jamie Foxx, and 90% of BlueSky. Other say the BAFTAs didn't do enough apologizing. So let's talk about it...

Watch the podcast episodes on YouTube and all major podcast hosts including Spotify.
